notes: The existing metadata path proves only first-rpc prefill metadata, not KV tensor reuse.
Use --allow-no-speedup only for parity/timing capture; do not promote demo status without actual measured speedup and memory impact.
operator_commands: BLOOMBEE_ENABLE_KV_PREFIX_REUSE=1 PYTHONPATH=.:src python scripts/text_generation_parity.py --server-maddr '<PASTE_SERVER_MULTIADDR>' --model TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0 --prompt '<COMMON_PREFIX><SUFFIX_A>' --max-new-tokens 4 --mode generate-api --out .local/kv-prefix-baseline-suffix-a.json

BLOOMBEE_ENABLE_KV_PREFIX_REUSE=1 PYTHONPATH=.:src python scripts/text_generation_parity.py --server-maddr '<PASTE_SERVER_MULTIADDR>' --model TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0 --prompt '<COMMON_PREFIX><SUFFIX_B>' --max-new-tokens 4 --mode generate-api --out .local/kv-prefix-reuse-suffix-b.json

assemble .local/kv-prefix-reuse-live-evidence.json with common_prefix_token_ids, varied suffix_token_ids, no-reuse baseline rows, reuse rows, generated_token_ids, logits fingerprints, reused_prefix_token_count, and positive timings
